# CUE Cinemas — React Premium Movie Booking Website

## Project Setup Progress

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite (ultra-fast bundling)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + custom CSS modules
- **Animations**: Framer Motion (advanced motion library)
- **Icons**: React Icons
- **State Management**: React Context API
- **Additional**: Clsx for className management

## Project Requirements
- Premium dark theme with gold accents
- Glassmorphism effects and smooth animations
- Advanced Framer Motion interactions
- Movie carousel with parallax effects
- Interactive ticket booking flow
- Mobile-responsive design
- Smooth scroll reveals and page transitions
- Real-time data bindings

## Completed Setup
✅ React 18 + TypeScript project structure
✅ Vite configuration for fast bundling
✅ Tailwind CSS with custom color palette
✅ Framer Motion integrated for animations
✅ All core components created and styled
✅ Responsive design system implemented
✅ Build process verified and working
✅ README documentation complete

## Next Steps
- Run `npm run dev` to start development server
- Open http://localhost:5173 in browser
